global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and long, pointed wings. It features a distinctive long tail with central feathers extending beyond the rest. The plumage is a mix of brown, gray, and white, with a dark cap on the head and a pale underbelly.

part_details.tail: Long, central feathers extending beyond the rest, dark brown.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, with a mix of brown and gray feathers.
part_details.head: Dark cap, contrasting with lighter neck and body.
part_details.underbelly: Pale, almost white, contrasting with darker upper parts.

spatial_relations: The long central tail feathers extend beyond the rest of the tail.
The dark cap covers the top of the head, contrasting with the lighter neck.
The pointed wings extend laterally from the streamlined body.
